content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Pre-market shows broad strength with all sectors green and Nifty up 0.42%, but India VIX at 18 indicates elevated volatility. US markets closed weak (Nasdaq -0.90%) which could weigh on opening. Book is 45% deployed with positive unrealized P&L; priority is managing existing positions and trailing SLs rather than adding aggressively. Open pending orders (PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) are stale (50+ hours old) and should be reviewed.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1028.02,
      "new_target": 1095.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "PNBHOUSING +6.2% with strong Q4 results (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA <1%). Current SL at 1028 is already above entry locking ~4.5% gain. Holding as-is — no MODIFY needed since SL is already trailed. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "GOLDBEES -1.9%, gold under near-term Fed hawkish pressure but medium-term constructive. SL at 119 gives reasonable breathing room. Hold as defensive hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 404.50,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "NTPC +1.2%, SL already at breakeven (404.50). Power sector tailwinds intact, Q4 results May 15. No change needed — emit HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SUNPHARMA +1.3%, SL already at 1735 (just above entry of 1734) — locking breakeven. Organon deal catalyst priced in but HDFC TP Rs 2030. No MODIFY needed since values match — emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "POWERGRID flat -0.1%. SL at 315 (~1.7% risk). Q4 results May 19 catalyst. Hold as-is, not enough move to trail."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "COALINDIA +0.2%. Q4 results came in strong (PAT +11%), Rs 26.75 dividend FY26. SL at 463 gives ~1.5% room. Hold; not enough move to justify trailing."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1425.00,
      "new_target": 1485.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "NESTLEIND +2.3%, currently at fresh 52w high (CMP 1445 vs 52w high 1437.90). Strong Q4 (revenue +22.6%, PAT +27%). Original target 1465 already very close to CMP — extending target to 1485 to allow further upside while keeping SL at 1425 (locks ~0.85% gain). The breakout argues for room to run."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "GLENMARK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 20,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 2400.00,
      "stop_loss": 2295.00,
      "target": 2580.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "GLENMARK breaking out to fresh 52w high backed by USFDA approval (Progesterone, $59M market), strong Q3 (revenue +15%, India formulations +22%). Generic exemption from US tariff is a sector tailwind. Entry near 2400, SL 2295 (~4.4%), target 2580 (~7.5%). Position size ~5% of capital. Risk-reward ~1:1.7. Position risk: 5% × 4.4% = 0.22% of portfolio (within budget)."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1028.02,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed to 1028 locking ~4.5% gain. Strong Q4 results. Let it run toward target 1095. Will tighten further if it pushes to 1080+."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; near-term Fed pressure but structural gold thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1425.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1425 (above entry) locking gains. Extending target to 1485 to give breakout room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 404.50,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven, Q4 results May 15 catalyst pending."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed to entry+1. Organon deal optimism — let it run toward 1830 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 315.00,
      "reasoning": "Flat position, Q4 May 19 catalyst. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 463.00,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4, dividend declared. Let it work toward 488 target."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "ONGC at 52w high but +5.39% gap-up is chasing — wait for pullback to 290-292. TATACHEM +11% pre-result rally is risky given Morgan Stanley downgrade and Q3 loss; avoid. ADANIENT board meeting tomorrow Apr 30 — binary event, NO_ACTION. RRKABEL board meeting also Apr 30 — wait for results. ATGL bearish per research (90x P/E, APM cut, flat profit growth) — avoid. DRREDDY bearish (Citi Sell, Brazil rejection, Q4 risk) — avoid. CESC defensive but lagging peers. INTELLECT/RKFORGE not enough conviction without more data.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 45% deployed with +0.79% unrealized today; rolling 5d performance is poor (14% win rate, profit factor 0.4x) — caution warranted. Three stale OPEN orders (PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) placed ~50 hours ago need attention but the schema doesn't allow direct CANCEL of pending orders here — flagging for review. Energy sector concentration (NTPC, POWERGRID, COALINDIA) is ~18% of capital — at limit, no more energy adds. Adding GLENMARK (pharma) diversifies the book. Total position risk budget remains within limits. Will reassess SLs aggressively as positions move."
}
